_comment: OVERLAY golden. Overlay enumeration grades products shown on ON-SCREEN INFO CARDS (price cards, spec panels, name banners baked into the broadcast graphics) — NOT products merely held up in-frame (that is the vision pass). Fill expected_products with the products the on-screen overlay graphics name; put host accessories / sponsor banners / decorative UI chrome in expected_negatives. Rename this file to {org_slug}_{video_id}.json and remove the leading underscore so the harness picks it up (files starting with _ are skipped). Curate against a real staging video; do NOT look at pipeline output while authoring.
